nodes.label: Tests for the Kanban tool surface (tools/kanban_tools.py).  Verifies:   - Tools
Normal `hermes chat` sessions (no HERMES_KANBAN_TASK) must have     zero kanban_
Worker sessions (HERMES_KANBAN_TASK set) must have all 7 tools.
Simulate being a worker: HERMES_HOME isolated, HERMES_KANBAN_TASK set     after
Peek at a different task than the one in env.
`result` alone (without summary) is accepted for legacy compat.
Convenience: a single parent id as string is coerced to [id].
Tool writes the per-task skills through to the kernel.
Convenience: a single skill name as string is coerced to [name].
skills: 42 must be rejected, not silently dropped.
A → B, then try to link B → A.
Drive the full claim -> heartbeat -> comment -> complete lifecycle     exclusive
A normal chat session (no HERMES_KANBAN_TASK) must NOT have     KANBAN_GUIDANCE
A worker session (HERMES_KANBAN_TASK set) MUST have the full     lifecycle guida
Sanity: the guidance block is under 4 KB so it doesn't blow     up the cached pr
